summary: Analysis of whether CP on Derrick Rose HoF question will rise above 28.90% by Sep 11
content:
Key facts:
- Current CP as of 2025-08-31: 28.90% (exactly at threshold)
- Threshold: strictly HIGHER than 28.90%
- Resolution: 2025-09-11 20:33:32
- Only 16 forecasters on underlying question (very small base)
- CP is weighted median, weighted by recency
- Derrick Rose retired 2023, generally considered unlikely HoF (Basketball Reference: 10%)
- Every NBA MVP has made the HoF historically, but Rose's career was cut short by injuries

Status quo analysis:
- If no forecasts change, CP stays at 28.90% → resolves NO
- Status quo favors NO

Movement analysis:
- 16 forecasters = highly volatile, single forecast can move CP
- No obvious news catalyst for Rose HoF in next 11 days
- Meta-question might draw attention but could push CP either direction
- Rose's weak HoF case suggests new informed forecasters might push DOWN
- Recency weighting means old forecasts naturally lose weight over time, creating drift

Conclusion: Slightly favors NO due to status quo bias and Rose's weak case
